title: a-B: plan-context description-undefined auto-heal — trigger reconcileKnowledge on read
description: When an existing KB entry has description===undefined in agents.meta.json (drift from older versions or human edits), plan_context responses serve undefined to the LLM and degrade hint quality. Add a buildPreflightDiagnostics check that detects any entry with missing description and triggers reconcileKnowledge({trigger:'auto-heal-description'}); response carries auto_healed:true + previous_revision_hash (mirrors rc.22 D2 pattern). Also extend ensureKnowledgeFresh to call into the same heal path on MCP startup.

files.change: Add detector: if any active entry has description===undefined → invoke reconcileKnowledge({trigger:'auto-heal-description'}); set auto_healed=true on returned PlanContextResult; carry previous_revision_hash
Extend to detect description-undefined case alongside existing revision-drift case
Add new trigger value `'auto-heal-description'` to meta_reconciled trigger union (or add new event_type if cleaner)

implementation: Read services/plan-context.ts to confirm exact buildPreflightDiagnostics signature and where PlanContextResult is assembled
Add description-undefined scan loop over active entries
If detected, call reconcileKnowledge with new trigger value; capture pre/post revision_hash
Surface auto_healed + previous_revision_hash on PlanContextResult (additive, optional fields — mirrors rc.22 D2)
Extend ensureKnowledgeFresh to share the heal path (DRY: extract a small `healDescriptionDrift` helper if useful)
Add unit tests: (a) entry with description=undefined → reconcile fires + auto_healed=true; (b) all-fresh KB → no reconcile, auto_healed=false; (c) idempotent re-run

reference.pattern: rc.22 D2 loadActiveMeta auto-heal + planContextResult.auto_healed plumbing

criteria: Plan_context response includes auto_healed=true when any entry had description=undefined pre-call
Post-heal, agents.meta.json shows description populated for the previously-undefined entry
Unit tests cover three scenarios (detection, no-op, idempotent)
Event ledger captures the auto-heal-description trigger

rationale.chosen_approach: Auto-heal on read path (mirrors rc.22 D2) — keeps hint quality up without forcing user intervention
alternatives_considered: Hard-error on description-undefined (rejected: blocks plan_context for benign drift)
Doctor-only fix (rejected: read path needs immediate quality, can't wait for explicit fab doctor)
rationale.tradeoffs: Slight extra reconcile cost on hint path (mitigated by check-cheap detector + cache)

manual_checks: Manually nullify description on a test entry, call fab_plan_context, verify auto_healed=true
success_metrics: No KB entries served with description=undefined post-rc.23
